# Syntrex LLC

> Syntrex LLC is an AI automation agency headquartered in Windermere, Florida. We build custom AI chatbots, workflow automation systems, and business automation tools for companies of all sizes, anywhere in the world. Every system is built from scratch and delivered ready to run.

## Company Details

- Name: Syntrex LLC
- Type: AI automation and digital services agency
- Headquarters: 513 Main Street, Windermere, FL 34786, United States
- Email: henry@syntrexio.com
- Website: https://syntrexio.com
- Founded by: Henry Bello
- Service area: Worldwide

## Services (15 offerings)

1. Website Design & Development — custom professional websites built from scratch, mobile ready, SEO optimized
2. AI Chatbots — custom chatbots that qualify leads, answer questions, and book appointments 24/7
3. AI Content & Social Media — blog posts, social captions, video scripts, AI-generated images, AI-built presentations, and scheduled posts in your brand voice
4. Lead Generation Systems — AI-powered pipelines that capture, score, and follow up with leads automatically
5. Workflow Automation — end-to-end automation of repetitive tasks like follow-ups, invoicing, data entry, lead routing
6. Custom AI Tools — internal tools for your team: proposal generators, quote builders, intake forms, report builders
7. Brand & Digital Presence — full digital presence buildout: website, social profiles, email setup, content strategy, AI systems
8. System Integration — connect existing tools so they communicate automatically (calendar, email, forms, databases)
9. Growth System Design — end-to-end AI growth systems for lead capture, nurturing, conversion, and retention
10. AI Content Systems — automated pipelines that draft emails, posts, proposals, reports, images, and presentations in brand voice
11. Automated Proposal Systems — professional branded proposals generated in under a minute
12. Client Onboarding Automation — automated onboarding from signed contract to kickoff
13. AI Strategy & Consulting — operations audit, automation opportunity mapping, implementation roadmap
14. Reporting & Analytics Systems — custom AI dashboards and automated reports
15. AI Business Planning — AI tools that generate business plans, financial projections, and strategic documents

## Pricing

Every project gets a custom quote. No fixed tiers or packages. One-time project builds and monthly retainers are available. Every quote is free and agreed before work starts.

## Real Clients & Case Studies

- HALT! Fire (industrial fire suppression): built full sales automation system, saved 10+ hours of manual work per week
- Doughbrik's Wavers (CPG snack brand): built internal automation tools, 3x faster workflows

- Amy Qian — Developer & Growth Strategist
